prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名从2021年第113位持续上升至2026年第97位，近年排名稳步提升，学校综合实力和认可度增强；20 22年声誉曾因学校管理问题偏负面，但近年无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第63位、评价"一般"，短视频曝光量中等；未见投档断档记录；化学工程与技术为A- 学科，是该校唯一A类学科；与招生专业中的化学工程与工艺、精细化工、过程装备与控制工程等直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电 子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业持续高热推荐，太原理工以工科为主，利好报考热度；本省2026年物理类考生估算约25.2万人（按近年64%比例折算），较2025年24 .98万人略有增加，较2024年437分下降，卷面难度或有所调整；太原理工大学位于山西省太原市，对湖北省考生属跨省报考；该校在湖北招生占比约3–4%，属中等偏下水平，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招约20%使竞争加剧、学校软科排名持续 上升提升吸引力、工科专业社会热度高，在2025年基准24295名基础上预计位次进一步后移；预测最低位次约27034名，区间26534–27534名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 19317 → 20151 → 19780 → 20986 → 24295, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 4500 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 24295, the largest decline in recent years; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 125 in 2021, 126 in 2022, 127 in 2023, 121 in 2024, and 124 in 2025, basically stable between 121–127; the 2026 plan is 149, an increase of about 20% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 113th in 2021 to 97th in 2026, with steady improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition; in 2022, reputation was somewhat negative due to university management issues, but there have been no major negative incidents in recent years; Douyin popularity ranks 63rd, with a rating of 'average', and short video exposure is moderate; no records of admission gaps; Chemical Engineering and Technology is an A- discipline, the only A-class discipline at the university; it directly corresponds to majors such as Chemical Engineering and Technology, Fine Chemicals, Process Equipment and Control Engineering, providing some support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended; Taiyuan University of Technology focuses on engineering, which benefits application popularity; the estimated number of Physics Category examinees in the province in 2026 is about 252,000 (calculated at about 64% of recent years), slightly higher than the 249,800 in 2025, and the score threshold decreased from 437 in 2024, indicating possible adjustments in exam difficulty; Taiyuan University of Technology is located in Taiyuan, Shanxi Province, making it an inter-provincial application for Hubei examinees; the university's enrollment proportion in Hubei is about 3–4%, at a medium-low level, with limited influence from regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant enrollment expansion of about 20% in 2026 intensifying competition, the steady rise in Soft Science rankings enhancing attractiveness, and the high social popularity of engineering majors, the ranking is expected to shift further backward based on the 2025 baseline of 24295; the predicted minimum ranking is about 27034, with a range of 26534–27534.
